name: Tom Cruise Cake
recipeInstructions: Prepare and bake the cake in a 9x13-inch pan according to package directions. While the cake is still warm, poke 15-20 holes in it with the handle of a large wooden spoon. Let cool slightly. Pour sweetened condensed milk and topping into the holes (this takes some time as you need to wait for it to soak in before pouring all of the topping and milk). Allow to stand for a few minutes before spreading Cool Whip over the top. Sprinkle with crushed Heath bars or Heath Sensations. Serves 12-16. Best kept refrigerated until serving.
